documentation.description:
This package provides the ``memcmp`` function as defined by the C standard.
``memcmp`` calls are directly generated by the compiler to perform record
or array comparisons.

subprograms.name: memcmp

documentation.description:
Compares the first ``N`` bytes of the memory areas ``S1`` and ``S2``.
It returns an integer less than, equal to, or greater than zero if
``S1`` is found, respectively, to be less than, to match, or be greater
than ``S2``.

If the parameter ``N`` is zero, the function returns 0.

It iterates on bytes, performs the comparison byte by byte, and returns
immediately if not equal.
